{{Infobox concept
| name = Kameira
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Kameira Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kameira are diverse, non-human and non-[[Elder]] creatures that have inhabited the world for millennia. They manifest in various animalistic forms, including birds, fish, serpents, mammals, and insects. While they are biologically unrelated to one another, all species share the miraculous ability to manipulate their natural environments through a force known as [[Intent]]. This supernatural control varies by habitat: sky-dwelling species like the [[Windwatcher]] or [[Stormwing]] manipulate air and gravity, sea creatures such as [[Deepstriders]] command water, forest species can influence vegetation or animals, and others possess abilities related to stone or fire. Kameira play several significant roles in society. They are hunted for their valuable parts, which can be used in [[alchemy]] or to create items with anomalous properties. Some individuals, such as the [[Imperial Guard]], undergo alchemical processes to replace human limbs with Kameira appendages to gain enhanced strength or specialized abilities. Others utilize Kameira for transport, riding on the backs of large winged species. Furthermore, some powerful individuals can draw upon the [[essence]] of multiple Kameira to augment their own capabilities, though this process can be physically destructive. They are also used in specialized equipment, such as wings decorated with their feathers or weapons embedded with their biological components.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Kameira is a creature of non-human and non-[[Elder]] origin capable of manipulating the world through seemingly supernatural means. These lion-like monsters, characterized by heads of sterling silver and bright red spiked claws, are known to fly during lightning storms and can reduce ships to matchsticks during their migrations. While [[Greenwardens]] work closely alongside them, the creatures are also hunted by individuals like [[Calder]] and can be utilized through [[Vessels]] by certain opponents. Some Kameira possess the ability to wield power freely, and even the alchemically preserved heart of an [[Elder]]-tainted baby can be repurposed as a jewel. Ultimately, these beings are central to various combatants, ranging from a cook wielding the power of a single creature to [[Jarelys Teach]] returning upon her Kameira bird.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Kameira]] is a creature hunted by [[Calder]] that only flies during lightning-storms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Kameira]] is a monster that fought on the deck.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Kameira]] is a creature similar to a lion with a head of sterling silver.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The monsters displayed a melding of human and [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kameira]] are creatures that [[Greenwardens]] work closely alongside.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kameira]] is one of the few who can use certain powers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kameira]] is something that can be hunted.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Kameira]] is a creature that can reduce ships to matchsticks during migrations.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Kameira]] has a bright red and spiked claw.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Kameira]] can wield power freely.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|An [[Elder]]-tainted baby [[Kameira]]'s alchemically preserved heart was used as a jewel in an earring.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Urzaia]]'s opponent uses a [[Kameira]] through her [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The cook fights with the power of a single [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Kameira]] refers to any creature not of human or [[Elder]] origin that can manipulate the world in seemingly supernatural ways.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Soulbound]] can call on the powers of [[Kameira]] if they hold their [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jarelys Teach]] returns on her [[Kameira]] bird.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As ancient beings that have inhabited the planet as long as or longer than humanity, Kameira possess the ability to control the world around them. These creatures take many forms, such as birds, fish, and furred beasts, with sky-dwelling varieties capable of manipulating gravity or air. Their potent natural forces are utilized in many ways, including as fast transport vehicles, [[arena]] fighters, or sea monsters with webbed claws that can pull ships. Because their power can reside inside others, the [[Imperial Guard]] integrates their parts into their bodies, and ninety percent of [[Soulbound]] use Kameira powers within their [[Vessels]]. In the case of [[Meia]], the Kameira inside her blood reinforces her physical strength, though it has also resisted her attempts at control.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] are beings that have lived on the planet as long as humanity or perhaps longer than the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] take the shape of various animals including birds, fish, serpents, and furred beasts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|All [[Kameira]] possess the ability to control the world around them.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] of the sky, particularly those shaped like birds or winged serpents, manipulate air or gravity.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There are four different [[Kameira]] depicted on intricately carved coffins in the sub-basement.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] burns exist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Guard]] integrates parts from [[Kameira]] into their bodies.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Kameira]] is a living art work that wings its way toward the [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Kameira]] is a fast vehicle used for transport.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] have natural advantages over man.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Ninety percent of [[Soulbound]] use the powers of [[Kameira]] in their [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] possess water-controlling powers.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] in [[Meia]]'s blood reinforces her body with strength.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The walls of the room [[Shera]] remembered were carved with [[Kameira]] reliefs.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] is a type of potent natural force.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] is a creature with a huge serpent eye.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] are creatures that can fight in the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] is a sea monster that can pull ships.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] is a sea serpent with webbed claws.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] is a living creature that can be ridden.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] is a creature that can dive into the ocean with a flick of its tail.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] has [[Kameira]] inside her.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kameira]] are entities whose power can reside inside others.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Kameira]] within [[Meia]] resisted her control.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Kameira are a variety of creatures found on the [[Aion]] islands that can take many forms, including wolves, [[Hydras]], Icewinders, Brightwolves, or slithering entities composed of shadow and liquid. These beings are known to attack villages, and some legends claim their hides consist of gold scales, while others associate the name with draconic eyes. Large specimens possess the ability to use their [[Intent]] to ignite fires, though [[Champions]] are strong enough to tear giant versions apart with their bare hands. Beyond these physical creatures, Kameira also manifests as a type of power found within [[Jerri's Vessel]] and her [[Awakened]] earring, which contains the mated power of a Kameira and a notorious [[Elder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Kameira]] is a type of creature that [[Jyrine]] recognizes from her studies.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] is a type of creature or trait associated with draconic eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]]'s [[Awakened]] earring bears the mated power of a [[Kameira]] and a notorious [[Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Kameira]] is a slithering creature of liquid and shadow.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Champions]] are capable of tearing giant [[Kameira]] apart with their bare hands.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The sparks seen by [[Urzaia]] are not [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] are creatures that include Brightwolves, Icewinders, or [[Hydras]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] are creatures that attack villages.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] is a type of power found in [[Jerri's Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] modifications exist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] can be wolves.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kameira]] refers to creatures found on [[Aion]] islands.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Kameira]] is a large creature that can use its [[Intent]] to set things on fire.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Kameira]] is a type of creature.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Legend says a [[Kameira]]'s hide is made of gold scales.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Kameira are blue-scaled creatures the size of a bear that possess unique powers, making them targets for tribes within the [[Dylian mountain range]]. These beings are significant to the formation of a [[Soulbound]], who requires power derived from an [[Elder]] or a Kameira. While the [[Imperial Guard]] is capable of fighting these creatures, some members of the guard are noted to be missing their Kameira parts. The [[essence]] of these beings is often harvested, as seen in Maxeus's staff which contains the blood of a flame-controlling Kameira and another staff housing the crystallized heart of an ancient specimen.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The staff contains the crystallized heart of an ancient [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kameira]] are creatures hunted by tribes in the [[Dylian mountain range]] for their powers.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Kameira]] is a blue-scaled creature the size of a bear.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Soulbound]] must have a measure of power from an [[Elder]] or a [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The staff used by Maxeus has the blood of a flame-controlling [[Kameira]] in it.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Kameira]] is a group that the [[Imperial Guard]] is capable of fighting.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Some [[Imperial Guards]] are missing their [[Kameira]] parts.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Kameira are creatures that fight across both the skies and the waves, possessing incredible eyesight and being utilized by [[Imperial Guards]] for surveillance. While some guards use flying specimens and alchemists employ leashed ones, a rogue Kameira is dangerous enough to drive a ship into an [[island]]. These beings can donate sensory gifts, and [[Jarelys Teach]] even replaced her own heart with one. A clash between a Kameira's heart and destructive [[Intent]] can trigger transformations, such as when the remaining [[Intent]] of the species allows [[Jorin]] to float using his wings. Additionally, Kameira refers to a species of rice that can be blessed and alchemically enhanced, a concept that [[Jerri]] fears.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Imperial Guards]] use winged [[Kameira]] for surveillance.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Some [[Imperial Guards]] use flying [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kameira]] possess incredible eyesight.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jarelys Teach]] replaced her heart with a [[Kameira]]’s.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alchemists]] use leashed [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A rogue [[Kameira]] is a creature that could drive a ship into an [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kameira]] can donate sensory gifts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A clash of destructive [[Intent]] and a [[Kameira]]’s heart can trigger transformations.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kameira]] is a species of rice that can be alchemically enhanced and blessed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Kameira]] is something [[Jerri]] fears.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The remaining [[Intent]] of the [[Kameira]] allows [[Jorin]] to use his wings to float.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kameira]] are creatures that fought on the waves and in the skies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kameira are creatures characterized by their orange eyes and diverse forms, ranging from the [[Stonefang]] to the avian [[Windwatcher]]. These beings possess unique abilities, such as the capacity to drift across the ocean floor or remain invisible while stalking jungle trees. Because they require specialized medication and care, they are often tamed for various roles, including serving as mounts for messengers. Their [[essence]] is deeply integrated into society, with their likenesses carved onto coffins, their sight embedded into weaponry, and even their limbs utilized by members of the [[Guild]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]'s eyes are normally [[Kameira orange]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Stonefang]] is a type of [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kameira]] can be tamed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The coffins in the room are carved with images of different [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Windwatcher]] is a type of bird [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kameira]] require special care and medication.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A weapon can be embedded with the sight of a [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Kameira]] is a creature that can stalk jungle trees while invisible.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Kameira]] is a creature that can drift over the ocean floor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Guild]] members have limbs of [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Messengers arrive on [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Will you burn one for us, sometime? I’d love to relive a battle, or a Kameira hunt, or a duel!”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have solutions that will give you the power of a Hydra, the constitution of a Nightwyrm, the fortitude of a Deepstrider...all the natural advantages that the Kameira have over man, they will be yours!<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
